prompt: Оцени ETA до release candidate, если у проекта нет подтверждённой скорости команды и часть proof ещё не сделана.

grounding.notes: ETA must stay conditional on remaining proof layers, available hosts, and no major scope changes.

good: give an ETA range rather than a single date
tie the range to explicit assumptions and blockers
say which missing proof layer dominates the schedule risk
bad: mentions time without the assumptions that make the estimate valid
ignores external dependencies such as real hosts or client access
unacceptable: presents an exact delivery date as if throughput were known
treats blocked runtime proof as already solved

items: give an ETA range rather than a single date
tie the range to explicit assumptions and blockers
say which missing proof layer dominates the schedule risk
presents an exact delivery date as if throughput were known
treats blocked runtime proof as already solved

failureMode: ETA is overconfident because schedule assumptions and proof blockers are ignored.
notes: Directly targets the most common planning overclaim in project-report responses.
